staffProfiles.title: Senior Lecturer
staffProfiles.department: Department of Computing and Information Science
staffProfiles.schoolFaculty: School of Pure and Applied Sciences
staffProfiles.officeAddress: Room 214, ICT Complex, BOUESTI Main Campus
staffProfiles.bio: Dr. Ayoyinka Akomolafe is a Senior Lecturer in the Department of Computing and Information Science at BOUESTI. His teaching and research focus on software engineering, data systems, applied artificial intelligence, and digital transformation in public institutions. He has supervised undergraduate and postgraduate projects in database systems, machine learning, and web application development. His current work explores practical technology adoption for education management, e-governance, and smart campus systems.
qualifications: B.Sc. Computer Science, Federal University of Technology, Akure
M.Sc. Computer Science, University of Ibadan
Ph.D. Computer Science, Ekiti State University
Postgraduate Diploma in Education, National Teachers' Institute

staffProfiles.title: Administrative Officer

staffProfiles.bio: Mrs. Abimbola Adeyemi is an Administrative Officer at BOUESTI with experience in records management, staff correspondence, student documentation workflows, and office coordination. She supports institutional administration through document processing, scheduling, internal communication, and service delivery across academic and administrative units. Her work emphasizes efficiency, confidentiality, and responsive support to staff and students.
qualifications: B.Sc. Public Administration, Ekiti State University
M.Sc. Public Administration, Bamidele Olumilua University of Education, Science and Technology
Certificate in Records and Information Management
Professional Diploma in Human Resource Administration

staffProfiles.officeAddress: Academic Planning Unit, Council Complex, BOUESTI Main Campus
staffProfiles.bio: Mr. Nura Suleiman serves in the Academic Planning Unit at BOUESTI. Nura supports daily university operations through institutional data support, reporting workflow, and planning coordination. The profile shares the same institutional template as academic staff while emphasizing administrative delivery, coordination, and campus support responsibilities.
qualifications: B.Sc. Economics, University of Ado-Ekiti

Certificate in Monitoring and Evaluation
